ddls:
CREATE TABLE "screen_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screen size range */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of screen sizes (e.g., 10”-15”, 15”-19”) */,
  "min_size_inches" REAL /* Minimum size of the screen in inches */,
  "max_size_inches" REAL /* Maximum size of the screen in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lighting environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the lighting environment (e.g., Full Dark Environment, Indoor without Lighting) */,
  "light_level_lux" REAL /* Average light level in lux for the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brightness_requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brightness requirement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the screen size range */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lighting environment */,
  "min_brightness_nits" INTEGER /* Minimum brightness level in nits */,
  "max_brightness_nits" INTEGER /* Maximum brightness level in nits */,
  "recommended_brightness_nits" INTEGER /* Recommended brightness level in nits */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brightness_requirements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES screen_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brightness_requirements_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "display_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each display model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the display model */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the screen size range of the model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the model was released */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the display (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of panel used (e.g., LCD, OLED) */,
  "refresh_rate_hz" INTEGER /* Refresh rate of the display in Hz */,
  "power_consumption_watts" REAL /* Power consumption of the display in watts */,
  "color_depth_bits" INTEGER /* Color depth of the display in bits */,
  "dimensions_mm" TEXT /* Dimensions of the display in millimeters (e.g., 300x500x10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_display_models_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES screen_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "display_environments" (
  "env_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment usage */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the display model */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lighting environment */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage in the environment (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "average_usage_duration_hours" REAL /* Average duration of usage in the environment in hours */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from users about the display in the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_display_environments_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_display_environments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES display_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brightness_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brightness test */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the display model being tested */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lighting environment */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "brightness_nits" REAL /* Brightness level achieved in nits */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "tester_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brightness_tests_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brightness_tests_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES display_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES display_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_development" (
  "dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development cycle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the display model */,
  "development_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of development (e.g., Design, Testing, Production) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the development stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the development stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the development stage (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "assigned_team" TEXT /* Team assigned to the development stage */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the development stage */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones and deliverables for the stage */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_development_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES display_models ("model_id")
)
